records.question: What games took place in the Summer season where male competitors were at least 41 years old, weighed at least 94, and were at most 171 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
JOIN person ON games_competitor.person_id = person.id
JOIN person_region ON person.id = person_region.person_id
WHERE games_competitor.age >= 41 AND person.gender = 'M' AND person.height <= 171 AND person.weight >= 94 AND games.season = 'Summer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
JOIN games_city gc ON g.id = gc.games_id
JOIN games_competitor gcpt ON g.id = gcpt.games_id
JOIN person p ON gcpt.person_id = p.id
WHERE g.season = 'Summer'
  AND p.gender = 'M'
  AND gcpt.age >= 41
  AND p.weight >= 94
  AND p.height <= 171

FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN city ON games_city.city_id = city.id
WHERE games.games_name = '1984 Winter' AND city.city_name = 'Sarajevo'

records.question: Which games named exactly 1956 Summer took place in 1956 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
WHERE games.games_year >= 1956 AND games.games_name = '1956 Summer'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM games WHERE games_name = '1956 Summer' AND games_year >= 1956

records.question: What games exactly named 2000 Summer included competitors who were at least 23 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
JOIN person ON games_competitor.person_id = person.id
JOIN person_region ON person.id = person_region.person_id
WHERE games.games_name = '2000 Summer' AND games_competitor.age >= 23
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT games.id
FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
WHERE games.games_name = '2000 Summer'
  AND games_competitor.age >= 23

records.question: Which games took place in the 1992 Summer event during the Summer season of 1992?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
WHERE games.games_name = '1992 Summer' AND games.season = 'Summer' AND games.games_year = 1992
records.pred_sql:
SELECT games.id
FROM games
WHERE games.games_year = 1992 AND games.season = 'Summer' AND games.games_name = '1992 Summer'

records.question: Which games took place in 2012 Summer during the Summer season?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_city ON games.id = games_city.games_id
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
WHERE games.season = 'Summer' AND games.games_name = '2012 Summer'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM games WHERE games_year = 2012 AND season = 'Summer'

records.question: Which Summer games from 1956 or later featured Masami Kubota competing at exactly age 24, where his height and weight are both exactly 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT games.id FROM games
JOIN games_competitor ON games.id = games_competitor.games_id
JOIN person ON games_competitor.person_id = person.id
JOIN person_region ON person.id = person_region.person_id
WHERE person.height = 0 AND person.full_name = 'Masami Kubota' AND games.games_year >= 1956 AND games_competitor.age = 24 AND games.season = 'Summer' AND person.weight = 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.id
FROM games g
JOIN games_competitor gc ON gc.games_id = g.id
JOIN person p ON p.id = gc.person_id
WHERE g.season = 'Summer'
  AND g.games_year >= 1956
  AND p.full_name = 'Masami Kubota'
  AND gc.age = 24
  AND p.height = 0
  AND p.weight = 0
